posts.post_text: 🔋 𝗠𝗮𝗷𝗼𝗿 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗠𝗜𝗥𝗔𝗜 𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿We are pleased to announce that Foresight Group has invested in MIRAI Power through its 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝗘𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗴𝘆 𝗜𝗻𝗳𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗜𝗜 𝗳𝘂𝗻𝗱.This partnership marks a significant step forward in our mission to accelerate the deployment of battery energy storage systems (BESS) across Germany. With Foresight’s support, we are strengthening our ability to:▪️ Scale our project pipeline▪️ Accelerate execution of grid-secured projects▪️ Expand in key BESS markets▪️ Contribute to a more flexible and resilient energy systemThe BESS market is evolving rapidly, and the ability to execute has never been more critical. Together with Foresight, we are well positioned to move efficiently from development to delivery. We would like to extend our sincere thanks to everyone involved in making this milestone possible - including Thomas Schubert and Dentons #team and Marco Vilardo for his relentless dedication to the deal. More details can be found here:https://lnkd.in/dkwXbRRJIf you would like to learn more, please feel free to contact us directly or connect with Julian Gerstner at the 𝗕𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘆 𝗕𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗗𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹𝗼𝗽𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝘂𝗺 𝗶𝗻 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗳𝘂𝗿𝘁 𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗿𝗼𝘄 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗪𝗲𝗱𝗻𝗲𝘀𝗱𝗮𝘆.#EnergyStorage #BESS #EnergyTransition #Infrastructure #Renewables #BatteryStorage… more

SRP and Invenergy Launch First-Ever Partnership To Add 200 MW Solar And 200 MW Battery Storage In Arizona’s SunDog Energy Center

Salt River Project and Invenergy have formed a partnership to develop the SunDog Energy Center in Pinal County, adding 200 megawatts of solar power and 200 megawatts of battery storage. This project aims to enhance Arizona's energy capacity, supporting 45,000 homes and creating substantial economic benefits, including job creation and local revenue....… more

GFCL EV Products has raised $80 million in fresh funding to accelerate expansion of its EV battery materials operations, taking total funding to $130 million. The company aims to scale production of advanced materials used in lithium-ion batteries and cater to rising demand from electric mobility and energy storage sectors. The move underscores increasing investor interest in India’s EV supply chain ecosystem.#EVNews #evnewsindia #gfclevproducts #GFCL #electricvehicles #electricvehiclesarethefuture #electricvehiclesindia… more

As our EU-funded Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project, titled RRF-6.5.1-23-2024-00064, approaches its conclusion, we believe it is essential to share the knowledge and insights we possess regarding this topic.We are pleased to introduce a new series of articles aimed at engaging local communities. Through these publications, we will explore the realities of today’s grid infrastructure, the challenges it faces, and the critical role that BESS can play in building a more resilient and flexible energy system.Our first article focuses on a fundamental concept: the importance of maintaining balance within the energy system. As renewable energy sources continue to expand, ensuring stability between supply and demand becomes increasingly complex, and increasingly vital.By opening up this conversation, we hope to contribute to a better understanding of both the opportunities and the limitations of the current grid, while highlighting how energy storage solutions can support the transition to a more sustainable future.Stay tuned for more insights as we continue this series.https://lnkd.in/d-zYieKF… more

HP Envy x360 15-fe1082wm | Intel Core Ultra 7-155U | 16GB LPDDR5 | 512GB PCIe NVMe | 15.6" FHD IPS Touch 360° | Wi-Fi 6E | Win 11. The premium convertible built on Intel's current-generation AI platform.The HP Envy x360 15-fe1082wm sits at the top of HP's consumer convertible lineup. The specification is worth examining closely because the Core Ultra 7-155U platform represents a genuine architectural shift — not an incremental generation update.Processor first — why Core Ultra matters:Intel Core Ultra 7-155U — 12 cores, 14 threads, boost to 4.8GHz, 12MB L3 cache, built on Intel 4 process. The Core Ultra series integrates a dedicated Neural Processing Unit on the die — enabling AI workloads including Microsoft Copilot, real-time camera processing, and AI-accelerated productivity features to run locally on the NPU without CPU load or battery drain. This is the Copilot+ PC architecture that most business laptops in the current market still don't qualify for.Full specification for procurement:— HP Envy x360 15-fe1082wm | 9R1K0UA — Processor: Intel Core Ultra 7-155U | 12 cores | up to 4.8GHz | NPU — RAM: 16GB LPDDR5 — Storage: 512GB PCIe NVMe SSD — Display: 15.6" FHD IPS Touch | 1920x1080 | 300 nits | micro-edge | multi-touch — Hinge: 360-degree — Laptop, Tent, Stand, Tablet modes — Wireless: Wi-Fi 6E | Bluetooth — Keyboard: Backlit | Copilot key — Ports: 2x USB-C | 2x USB-A | HDMI 2.1 | combo audio jack — Charging: HP Fast Charge — 0 to 50% in ~30 minutes — Battery: up to 10 hours 15 minutes — Security: Privacy Shutter Door camera | Walk Away Lock — OS: Windows 11 Home — Build: Recycled aluminium | Energy Star certified — Color: Mineral SilverRelevant for professional procurement:The 360-degree form factor is the primary use-case differentiator versus standard clamshells. For professionals who present to clients, annotate documents with touch, or need tablet mode for field work — the Envy x360 eliminates the need for a separate tablet device. Wi-Fi 6E is relevant for high-density office environments where Wi-Fi 6 congestion is a known issue. HP Fast Charge minimises downtime between sessions.Available now at AZC Electronics, Deira Dubai. Volume pricing available on request.azcstore.com | UAE-wide delivery DM for trade pricing and availability#HPEnvyx360 #EnvyX360 #CoreUltra7 #IntelCoreUltra #AIPC #CopilotPC #2in1Laptop #ConvertibleLaptop #WiFi6E #TechDubai #UAETech #AZCElectronics #azcstore #ITInfrastructure #TechProcurement #BusinessLaptop #PremiumLaptop #DubaiTech #Windows11 #HPLaptop… more

posts.post_text: #CLNBForums We are thrilled to announce the 𝗦𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗼𝗻-𝗯𝗮𝘀𝗲𝗱 𝗔𝗻𝗼𝗱𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘆 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝘂𝗺, taking place on 𝗔𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗹 𝟵𝘁𝗵, 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲, as a high-tech highlight of the 𝗖𝗟𝗡𝗕 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗼! Join us at the Suzhou International Expo Center for a deep dive into the next-generation materials set to break the energy density ceiling of lithium batteries.👉 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗮𝘁𝗲: https://lnkd.in/gYEh4x74𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗳𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝘀𝗲𝗮𝘁: https://lnkd.in/gVPnEnfG✨ 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗰 𝗢𝘂𝘁𝗹𝗼𝗼𝗸: 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗸𝗲𝘁 𝗣𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝘀 & 𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗽𝗹𝘆 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗶𝗻• Supply & Demand Dynamics: Analyze the global supply and demand pattern of silicon-based anodes and the competitive landscape for 2026.• Cost Reduction Path: Explore the roadmap for large-scale industrialization and cost optimization of silicon-carbon materials.• Global Layout: Gain insights into the domestic and international expansion strategies of leading anode material producers.🔬 𝗙𝗿𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗲𝗿 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: 𝗠𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗹𝘀 & 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗴• Silicon-Carbon Breakthroughs: Deep dive into the latest R&D on porous carbon frameworks and high-capacity silicon-oxygen technology.• Binder & Electrolyte Synergy: Understand the critical role of specialized binders and electrolyte additives in managing silicon volume expansion.• Equipment Evolution: Discover how advanced grinding and CVD (Chemical Vapor Deposition) technologies are redefining silicon-based anode production.🤝 𝗘𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗻𝗲𝗹: 𝗡𝗮𝘃𝗶𝗴𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗘𝗿𝗮• Material Pioneers: Strategic insights from top-tier anode manufacturers on the transition from graphite to silicon-rich systems.• Cell Integration: Perspectives from leading battery makers on the application of silicon-based anodes in high-nickel cylindrical and pouch cells.• Future Trends: A collaborative dialogue on the integration of silicon anodes with solid-state battery technology.📅 Mark Your Calendar: April 9th, 2026📍Our Venue: Suzhou International Expo Center, ChinaWe invite you to join these global authorities and capture the next wave of high-energy storage breakthroughs!For registration or inquiries, please contact:Dan Chu | +86 177 2134 3809 | chudan@smm.cn#CLNB2026 #SiliconAnode #BatteryMaterials #LithiumIon #NextGenTech #SMM #EnergyStorage #Innovation #SuzhouExpo… more

𝐈𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐄𝐕 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭 𝐎𝐮𝐭𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔–𝟐𝟑𝟎𝟔 | 𝐍𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞The global immersion cooling for EV battery market is entering a high-growth phase, fueled by the accelerating shift toward electric mobility and next-gen battery performance requirements.Immersion cooling is emerging as a game-changing technology, enabling superior thermal management, enhanced safety, and extended battery lifecycle by directly submerging battery cells in dielectric fluids.As EV manufacturers push for higher energy density and fast-charging capabilities, advanced cooling solutions are becoming mission-critical across automotive and energy storage ecosystems.𝗕𝘆 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Single-phase Cooling, Two-phase Cooling 𝗕𝘆 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Electric Vehicles, Energy Storage Systems 𝗕𝘆 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗼𝗻: North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, Middle East & Africa𝗕𝘆 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝗬𝗘𝗥𝗦: 3M, Shell, Castrol👉 𝗔𝘀𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘀𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝘀, 𝗰𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗼𝗿 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗰 𝗶𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀.https://lnkd.in/d3KC5jdZ#EV #BatteryTechnology #Cooling #ElectricVehicles #EnergyStorage #FutureMobility #MarketInsights… more

This funding will support their efforts in the European market. 🔗 Source: https://lnkd.in/d4v-Czkg … more

Battery storage today is no longer just about capacity, but about the flexibility of the entire system design. 🔋 The LUNA2000-241 kWh Series is built on a modular architecture that allows precise sizing of both capacity and power according to specific applications – from smaller installations to large-scale C&I projects. 📊 With 241 kWh capacity per unit and parallel connection capability, it creates a flexible foundation for projects where peak shaving, import limit control, or load stabilization are essential. In practice, this means not just energy storage, but an active tool for consumption management, reducing operational costs, and optimizing the overall energy system performance. 🔗 More information: https://lnkd.in/eZFNbXhr#BESS #EnergyStorage #FusionSolar #Photomate #PeakShaving #EnergyManagement #Luna241 … more

🔋 Introducing SAKO LI-SUN PRO 51.2V 100Ah (5.12kWh)As the demand for reliable and intelligent energy storage continues to grow, SAKO presents the new LI-SUN PRO — a high-performance lithium battery designed for residential, commercial, and off-grid applications.⚡ Key Advantages: • 5.12kWh high-capacity energy storage • Built with premium Grade A LiFePO₄ cells for enhanced safety and longevity • 5-year warranty for dependable operation • Integrated Bluetooth & WiFi for real-time monitoring • Wall-mounted design for efficient space utilization • Smart touchscreen interface for easy control • Multi-language support (14 languages) • Built-in battery level indicator for clear status visibility🔧 Designed for flexibility and compatibility, the LI-SUN PRO supports a wide range of solar energy systems, making it an ideal solution for distributors, installers, and EPC companies.🌍 Whether for home energy storage or commercial backup systems, SAKO continues to deliver reliable and scalable energy solutions worldwide.#SAKO #EnergyStorage #LithiumBattery #SolarEnergy #BESS #RenewableEnergy #CleanEnergy #SolarSolutions #BusinessOpportunity… more
